calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Feb-23-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry Sykes for and with Marilyn Saner (Petitioner).

Ms. Sykes addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to the abatement, the reserve and the Trustee's fees/services rendered. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Jan-26-2011 Continued To Feb-09-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kerry Riordan for and with Marilyn Saner.

The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Jun-22-2010 Continued To Jul-06-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
